---
title: "Time Series Analysis and Forecasting Review"
subtitle: "Trend, Seasonality, Autocorrelation, Backtesting, Intervals, and Forecast Governance"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Series definition

State the series, time index, frequency, units, and forecast horizon.

## Temporal diagnostics

Inspect trend, seasonality, lag dependence, stationarity, missing periods, and structural breaks.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
actual = [169, 164, 150, 137]
forecast = [155, 151, 139, 128]
mae = sum(abs(a - f) for a, f in zip(actual, forecast)) / len(actual)
print({"mae": mae})
```

## Backtesting

Use rolling-origin evaluation or another time-preserving validation design.

## Forecast release

Publish point forecasts with prediction intervals and release status.

## Appendix

Preserve model registry, diagnostics, backtests, horizons, and monitoring records.
